evidence: Uses visitor_key stored in localStorage key fm_career_shortlist_visitor_key.
Emits attribution only after backend write succeeds.
Only subject_kind=job_slug is allowed in frontend types.
Optional context_snapshot_uuid, projection_uuid, and recommendation_snapshot_uuid inputs exist in submit client but current UI does not pass them.
Rejects unexpected keys outside visitor_key, subject_kind, subject_slug, source_page_type, locale.
Validates subject_kind in job_slug and source_page_type in career_job_detail/career_recommendation_detail.
Returns shortlist_item_uuid and optional context/projection/recommendation snapshot identifiers.
Creates CareerShortlistItem keyed by visitor_key, subject_kind, subject_slug, source_page_type.
Resolves existing public Occupation by canonical_slug.
Attaches latest RecommendationSnapshot context_snapshot_id, profile_projection_id, and recommendation_snapshot_id when available.
Belongs to Occupation, ContextSnapshot, ProfileProjection, and RecommendationSnapshot.
No UASP profile write API observed in scanned files.

requiredFixesBeforePhase5B: Document why context_snapshot_id/profile_projection_id/recommendation_snapshot_id on CareerShortlistItem do not constitute UASP profile memory.
Confirm DSAR/deletion lifecycle for CareerShortlistItem before any profile-memory or recommendation use.
Keep saved careers out of recommendation scoring and personality inference.
